tasks.title: Add filtering by department and level to Position Descriptions
tasks.summary: Add dropdown filters for department and level on People page. Enable bookmarkable URL query params.
tasks.content:
# Phase 2: Filtering & Organization

**Context:** Phase 1 MVP complete - 7 position descriptions displaying on People page.

## Requirements
- Department dropdown filter
- Level dropdown filter
- URL query params for bookmarkable links
- Clear filters button

## Implementation
- Use existing `getUniqueDepartments()` and `getUniqueLevels()` utilities
- Client-side filtering (data cached)
- React Router `useSearchParams` for URL sync

## Related
- Session: `/home/jtaylor/everything-claude-code/docs/sessions/2026-02-16-intranet-position-descriptions-phase1.md`

tasks.title: Implement full-text search for Position Descriptions
tasks.summary: Add search input with PostgreSQL full-text search across PD titles, responsibilities, and KPIs.

tasks.title: Build detail view modal for full Position Description display
tasks.summary: Replace 'coming soon' modal with full PD detail view showing all responsibilities, KPIs, reporting structure, and metadata.

tasks.title: Link Position Description KPIs to Metabase dashboards
tasks.summary: Create KPI mapping table in Supabase linking PD KPIs to Metabase dashboard URLs. Display live KPI data in PD detail view.

tasks.title: Build competency framework integration for Position Descriptions
tasks.summary: Link PD responsibilities to competency definitions, training resources, and progress tracking. Enable career progression pathways.
